@@ -1321,8 +1321,8 @@
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.1.10","title":"Bench: parser throughput + patch apply cost (core engine)","description":"Goal
- Build repeatable benchmarks for the core engine so optimization work is rigorous and gated.

Bench Corpus
- Maintain a realistic byte-stream corpus (build logs, dense SGR, markdown-ish output, unicode-heavy lines).
- Every benchmark run records corpus id/hash + git_sha so results are comparable.

Metrics
- Parser throughput (MB/s) for each corpus stream.
- Patch generation + patch apply cost under typical workloads.
- Memory footprint per 1k lines scrollback and under resize storms.

Outputs
- Machine-readable results (JSON) suitable for CI regression gates.

Acceptance Criteria
- Variance is characterized and documented; thresholds are set for meaningful regressions (p95 or distributional tests).
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:20.414665310Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T09:16:27.091088022Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.10","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:20.414665310Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.10","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:20.414665310Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.10","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:20.414665310Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.10","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:20.414665310Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.1.11","title":"Fuzz: frankenterm-core parser and grid mutation entrypoints","description":"Goal
- Add fuzz targets to harden the parser and mutation logic.

Acceptance Criteria
- Fuzz harnesses run locally and in CI (time-bounded) with crash artifacts captured.
- Any found crashes become regression fixtures in the conformance corpus.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:25.855515429Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:25.855515429Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.11","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:25.855515429Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.11","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:25.855515429Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.11","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:25.855515429Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.1.2","title":"Implement: new crate frankenterm-core (API skeleton + workspace wiring)","description":"Goal
- Add `crates/frankenterm-core` with the minimal public API surface and internal module layout.

Notes
- Keep dependencies minimal.
- `#![forbid(unsafe_code)]`.

Acceptance Criteria
- `cargo check -p frankenterm-core` passes (native).
- Basic types compile: Grid, Cell, Parser, Patch.
","notes":"Implemented crate skeleton in crates/frankenterm-core (Cell/SgrAttrs, Cursor+SavedCursor, Grid ops, Modes flags, Parser skeleton emitting Actions, Patch + Scrollback skeleton). Wired into workspace Cargo.toml. Verified: cargo check -p frankenterm-core, cargo test -p frankenterm-core.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CyanTower","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:32.893073810Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T18:49:05.512397161Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T18:49:05.512374489Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.2","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:32.893073810Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.2","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:32.893073810Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","title":"Implement: terminal grid data model (cells, lines, cursor, modes)","description":"Goal
- Implement the core in-memory model used by the terminal engine.

Requirements
- Cell model: text (grapheme), fg/bg, attrs (bold/italic/underline/etc), hyperlink id, and width.
- Grid model: fixed columns, rows; supports efficient row clears and spans.
- Cursor + modes: wrap, origin, insert, autowrap; plus placeholders for DEC modes.

Acceptance Criteria
- Unit tests for all basic mutations.
- No panics on edge cases (min size, zero-length operations).
","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:39.421707588Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T18:50:37.880723949Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:39.421707588Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:39.421707588Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:39.421707588Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-lff4p.1.4","title":"Implement: scrollback + resize/reflow policy","description":"Goal
- Support realistic scrollback and correct behavior under resize.

Requirements
- Scrollback buffer with configurable capacity.
- Clear reflow policy: what happens to wrapped lines on resize.
- Resize invariants: cursor position, viewport, selection (if any), and mode semantics.

Acceptance Criteria
- Deterministic replay fixtures for resize storms.
- Bench coverage for resize cost and memory.

- Implement the core in-memory model used by the terminal engine.

Requirements
- Cell model: text (grapheme), fg/bg, attrs (bold/italic/underline/etc), hyperlink id, and width.
- Grid model: fixed columns, rows; supports efficient row clears and spans.
- Cursor + modes: wrap, origin, insert, autowrap; plus placeholders for DEC modes.

Acceptance Criteria
- Unit tests for all basic mutations.
- No panics on edge cases (min size, zero-length operations).

+{"id":"bd-lff4p.1.4","title":"Implement: scrollback + resize/reflow policy","description":"Goal
- Support realistic scrollback and correct behavior under resize.

Requirements
- Scrollback buffer with configurable capacity.
- Clear reflow policy: what happens to wrapped lines on resize.
- Resize invariants: cursor position, viewport, selection (if any), and mode semantics.

Acceptance Criteria
- Deterministic replay fixtures for resize storms.
- Bench coverage for resize cost and memory.

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.1.5","title":"Implement: selection model + copy extraction","description":"Goal
- Implement selection primitives (char/cell/word/line) and copy extraction from grid+scrollback.

Requirements
- Coordinate model for selections spanning scrollback and viewport.
- Word selection heuristics tuned for code and paths.

Acceptance Criteria
- Deterministic tests for selection across wrapped lines and resize.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:49.789352547Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:49.789352547Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:49.789352547Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:49.789352547Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","title":"Implement: VT/ANSI parser state machine (CSI/OSC/SGR + edits)","description":"Goal
- Implement the output stream parser and apply mutations to the grid.

Must Support (initial)
- CSI cursor moves, erase in line/screen, insert/delete char/line, scroll up/down, set scroll region.
- SGR attributes and colors (16/256/truecolor).
- OSC 0/2 (title) (optional storage) and OSC 8 hyperlinks.

Acceptance Criteria
- Conformance fixtures from bd-lff4p.1.1 replay to exact expected grid snapshots.
- Proptest: parser never panics on arbitrary byte streams.
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T09:18:10.202126850Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:18:10.202088217Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.1.7","title":"Implement: hyperlink registry (OSC 8) + click mapping","description":"Goal
- Track OSC 8 hyperlinks in a compact registry and expose hit-testing hooks for the web renderer.

Acceptance Criteria
- Fixtures cover overlapping hyperlinks, resets, and clear-on-scroll behavior.
- API supports mapping cell->url efficiently.

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.3.8","title":"Test: wasm-bindgen-test coverage for ftui-web runner","description":"Goal
- Add WASM-side tests for core event and rendering flows.

Acceptance Criteria
- Headless tests validate update/view invariants.
- A small set of end-to-end render checksums run under wasm test runner.

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.3.9","title":"Optimize: wasm binary size + startup time (LTO, feature gating)","description":"Goal
- Make the web demo load fast and keep wasm artifacts small.

Acceptance Criteria
- Measured size targets with before/after numbers.
- Startup (time-to-first-frame) improved with profiling evidence.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:53:51.411482665Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T08:53:51.411482665Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.3.9","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:53:51.411482665Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.3.9","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.3.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:53:51.411482665Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.3.9","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:53:51.411482665Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.4","title":"ftui-native backend: replace Crossterm (Unix-first)","description":"Scope
- Replace Crossterm with a first-party backend: raw mode, alt-screen, mouse, bracketed paste, focus events, kitty keyboard, resize, and robust cleanup.
- Drive input via ftui-core InputParser on raw bytes (no Crossterm event translation).

Deliverables
- New backend crate (name TBD) and integration into ftui-core/ftui-runtime.
- PTY + panic-cleanup tests; perf improvements via fewer syscalls + tighter buffering.
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:49:31.341662263Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T08:49:31.341662263Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:49:31.341662263Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-lff4p.4.1","title":"Implement: new native terminal backend crate (ftui-tty)","description":"Goal
- Add a first-party native terminal backend crate to replace Crossterm.

Scope
- Unix-first (Linux/macOS). Windows later.

Acceptance Criteria
- Minimal API compiles and can be used by ftui-core/ftui-runtime via a backend trait.
- `#![forbid(unsafe_code)]` in the crate.
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:12.192287374Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:12.192287374Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:12.192287374Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:12.192287374Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-lff4p.4.1","title":"Implement: new native terminal backend crate (ftui-tty)","description":"Goal
- Add a first-party native terminal backend crate to replace Crossterm.

Scope
- Unix-first (Linux/macOS). Windows later.

Acceptance Criteria
- Minimal API compiles and can be used by ftui-core/ftui-runtime via a backend trait.
- `#![forbid(unsafe_code)]` in the crate.
","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:12.192287374Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T18:59:16.922123334Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:12.192287374Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:12.192287374Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.4.2","title":"Implement: Unix raw mode + terminal feature toggles (alt-screen, mouse, paste, focus, kitty)","description":"Goal
- Replace Crossterm terminal mode management with our own, with stronger semantics and fewer surprises.

Requirements
- Raw mode enter/exit.
- Alt screen enter/leave.
- Mouse capture enable/disable.
- Bracketed paste + focus events.
- Kitty keyboard protocol enable/disable.
- Robust Drop-based cleanup + panic safety.

Acceptance Criteria
- PTY tests prove cleanup on normal exit and panic.
- No leaked terminal state (cursor visible, raw mode off, alt-screen restored).
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:20.934040745Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:20.934040745Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:20.934040745Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:20.934040745Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:20.934040745Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.4.3","title":"Implement: Unix input reader (poll + bytes) feeding ftui-core InputParser","description":"Goal
- Replace Crossterm event polling with a tight byte-reader + ftui-core parsing.

Requirements
- Non-blocking or poll-based read with timeout.
- Convert bytes to ftui-core Event via existing InputParser.
- Support resize, focus, bracketed paste, mouse sequences.

Acceptance Criteria
- Input parity tests vs current behavior for core keys and mouse sequences.
- No busy-looping when idle.
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:27.260346524Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:27.260346524Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:27.260346524Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:27.260346524Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:27.260346524Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.4.4","title":"Implement: resize detection + size queries (SIGWINCH)","description":"Goal
- Provide accurate, low-latency resize handling without Crossterm.

Requirements
- Query terminal size via ioctl.
- Deliver resize events via SIGWINCH or equivalent.

Acceptance Criteria
- Stress test: resize storm does not drop or reorder events; no panics.
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:32.571651561Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:32.571651561Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.4.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:32.571651561Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.4.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:54:32.571651561Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

@@ -669,3 +669,5 @@ jobs:
           cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p ftui-layout
           cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p ftui-text
           cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p ftui-i18n
+          cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p frankenterm-core
+          cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p frankenterm-web

@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+[package]
+name = "frankenterm-web"
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2024"
+license = "MIT"
+description = "WASM frontend for FrankenTerm: web rendering + input, exported via wasm-bindgen."
+repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui"
+homepage = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui"
+documentation = "https://docs.rs/frankenterm-web"
+readme = "../../README.md"
+
+[lib]
+crate-type = ["cdylib", "rlib"]
+
+[features]
+default = []
+
+[dependencies]
+frankenterm-core = { path = "../frankenterm-core", version = "0.1.0" }
+
+[target.'cfg(target_arch = "wasm32")'.dependencies]
+js-sys = "0.3.85"
+wasm-bindgen = "0.2.108"
+wasm-bindgen-futures = "0.4.58"
+web-sys = { version = "0.3.85", features = ["HtmlCanvasElement"] }
+

@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+#![forbid(unsafe_code)]
+
+//! WASM frontend for FrankenTerm.
+//!
+//! This crate is intentionally host-specific (web/WASM). The initial goal is to
+//! provide a stable `wasm-bindgen` API surface for:
+//! - feeding bytes (remote VT/ANSI streams),
+//! - applying cell patches (client-side ftui mode),
+//! - capturing web input events,
+//! - driving rendering.
+//!
+//! The actual WebGPU renderer and full input system will be implemented behind
+//! this API.
+
+#[cfg(target_arch = "wasm32")]
+mod wasm;
+
+#[cfg(target_arch = "wasm32")]
+pub use wasm::FrankenTermWeb;
+
+/// Native builds compile this crate as a stub so `cargo check --workspace` stays
+/// green on non-wasm targets.
+#[cfg(not(target_arch = "wasm32"))]
+#[derive(Debug, Default)]
+pub struct FrankenTermWeb;
+
+#[cfg(not(target_arch = "wasm32"))]
+impl FrankenTermWeb {
+    #[allow(clippy::new_without_default)]
+    pub fn new() -> Self {
+        Self
+    }
+}
